title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Cars24 - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Cars24 - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the Cars24 family as a Backend Developer in Pimpri-Chinchwad. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Cars24:
Cars24 is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in REST APIs

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cars24!
